panel.title: Pakistani Prime Minister Shebaz Sharif has announced a peace deal between the United States and Iran
panel.meta: Pakistani Prime Minister Shebaz Sharif has announced a peace deal between the United States and Iran resulting in the "permanent termination of military operations on all fronts, including in Lebanon." The official signing ceremony will be on Friday June 19th in Switzerland. Prime Minister Sharif goes on to thank Saudi Arabia and Turkey for their contributions in this effort https://iran.liveuamap.com/en/2026/14-june-21-pakistani-prime-minister-shebaz-sharif-has-announced
